column1: The boiler has been broken for six weeks and we have no heating or hot water. I have reported this three times and nobody has responded.
There is a severe water leak coming through the bedroom ceiling and mould is growing on the walls.
I have been overcharged on my rent this month by 200 dollars and need a refund immediately.
The communal garden has been looking wonderful lately and residents are really enjoying the space.
The electrical wiring in the kitchen is sparking and I am scared there will be a fire.
Our neighbours are making excessive noise every night until 3am and we cannot sleep.
The roof has been leaking for three months and we have reported it four times with no response.
I would like to request information about renewing my tenancy agreement which expires in two months.
